question: Who was born first, British novelist Doris Lessing or American writer Philip K. Dick? Write your answer as [ANSWER].

1.fact: Doris Lessing: Doris May Lessing, CH (nee Tayler; 22 October 1919 - 17 November 2013) was a British novelist, poet, playwright, librettist, biographer and short story writer.
1.subquestion: When was British novelist Doris Lessing born?

2.fact: Philip K. Dick: Philip Kindred Dick (December 16, 1928 - March 2, 1982) was an American writer notable for publishing works of science fiction.
2.subquestion: When was American writer Philip K. Dick born?

reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Doris Lessing was born on 22 October 1919, while Philip K. Dick was born on December 16, 1928, so Doris May Lessing was born first. -> Doris May Lessing

reasoning_hops.reasoning: Node 1 and Node 2: Doris Lessing was born on 22 October 1919, while Philip K. Dick was born on December 16, 1928, so Doris May Lessing was born first. -> Doris May Lessing
